short_description.value: VHM is a Versatile and Honest Vision Language Model for remote sensing image analysis, built on large-scale remote sensing image-text and instruction datasets (VersaD and HnstD) with rich-content captions and both factual and deceptive questions. It integrates multi-level visual representations and achieves state-of-the-art performance on various remote sensing tasks, including scene classification, visual question answering, visual grounding, building vectorizing, multi-label classification, and honest question answering.

pretext_training_type.value: Vision-language pretraining with image-text alignment and instruction tuning

pretraining.value: Two-stage: (1) Pretraining on VersaD (large-scale RS image-text pairs with rich-content captions); (2) Supervised fine-tuning on VersaD-Instruct, VariousRS-Instruct, and HnstD for instruction following and honesty.

value.value: Multi-level feature integration (concatenation of 8th, 16th, 24th transformer layers)
